title: Sophia — the Wisdom Gate: a provenance-aware, verifier-gated reasoning layer that abstains instead of fabricating
description: Sophia is a provenance-aware, verifier-gated reasoning layer for large language models that abstains instead of fabricating. Given a claim, it verifies the claim against machine-readable sources and then accepts, abstains, or blocks. The system targets attribution hallucination and is evaluated under a pre-registered no-overclaim measurement gate (≥2 independent judge families, reported inter-judge agreement, ≥3 runs, and confidence intervals). Archiving this release on Zenodo mints a permanent DOI and a fixed authorship + date record as part of the project's defensive-publication / provenance strategy.
